videos.title: I give students extra credit for sleeping—here’s why | Michael Scullin | TEDxBaylor University
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description:
What if getting more sleep could boost your grades and transform your life? The Eight Hour Sleep Challenge proves that prioritizing rest, even during life’s most stressful moments, enhances focus, productivity, and overall well-being.

videos.title: What The Arab World Can Teach Us About Leadership | Marilyn Zakhour | TEDxAl Wasl Salon
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: In a world teaching us to close off, protect ourselves and harden, what if the real power of leadership lies in staying open? videos.title: Motion in Stillness | Jennifer Gearin | TEDxUConn
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description:

videos.description: Relationships are some of the most fundamental aspects of humans' lives. They are associated with greater longevity, lower morbidity, and well-being. videos.description: In a world where money shapes opportunity, security, and freedom, financial literacy remains inaccessible to far too many people, even while being in front of our very own eyes.
